query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Oddity', 'Something unusual or strange', '“The sculpture was an oddity that puzzled many visitors.”', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ode', 'A short poetical composition, a lyric poem', 'Her ode became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Odious', 'Instilling hatred or intense displeasure', 'The passage presents a odious portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Odium', 'Intense hatred, especially toward a contemptible person', 'Her odium became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Odoriferous', 'Having an odor or fragrance', 'What seemed odoriferous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Odorous', 'Having a distinctive odor', 'The reviewer described the tone as odorous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Offhand', 'Without planning or thinking ahead', 'Scholars noted a striking offhand between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Officiate', 'To perform the functions of some office', 'Over time, the community learned to officiate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Officious', 'Self-assertive, overbearing', 'What seemed officious at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Offshoot', 'A branch or lateral shoot  from a main stem, as of a plant', 'Her offshoot became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ogle', 'To stare at (someone or something), especially covetously', 'Critics argued that the plan might ogle the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ogre', 'A type of giant from folk tales that eats human flesh', 'The essay highlights the ogre of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ointment', 'A viscous preparation of oils used as a treatment', 'The essay highlights the ointment of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Olfactory', 'Concerning the sense of smell', 'The essay highlights the olfactory of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Oligarchy', 'Government by the few', 'Her oligarchy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ominous', 'Foreboding or foreshadowing evil', 'The reviewer described the tone as ominous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Omission', 'The act of omitting', 'Scholars noted a striking omission between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Omnipotent', 'Almighty or infinite in power, as god', 'The passage presents a omnipotent portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Omnipresent', 'Present everywhere at the same time; ubiquitous', 'The reviewer described the tone as omnipresent, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Omniscient', 'Having total knowledge', 'The reviewer described the tone as omniscient, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Omnivorous', 'Having a diet which is neither carnivorous nor herbivorous', 'The passage presents a omnivorous portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Onerous', 'Burdensome or involving great effort', '“The new regulations placed onerous demands on small businesses.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Onomatopoeia', 'The property of a word of sounding like what it represents', 'Her onomatopoeia became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Onrush', 'A forceful rush or flow forward', 'Scholars noted a striking onrush between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Onset', 'The beginning or start', 'Scholars noted a striking onset between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Onslaught', 'An onset, assault, or attack, especially a vigorous one', 'Scholars noted a striking onslaught between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Onus', 'A legal obligation', 'Her onus became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opalescence', 'Exhibiting a play of colors like that of the opal', 'Scholars noted a striking opalescence between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opaque', 'Not transparent or difficult to understand', '“The explanation was so opaque that few people grasped the concept.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Operative', 'Functioning or having an effect', '“Only the last clause of the contract is operative.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Operetta', 'A lighter opera with a frivolous story and spoken dialogue', 'The essay highlights the operetta of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opinion', 'To have or express as an opinion', 'The author hoped the new policy would opinion tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opponent', 'An individual or group who is a rival of another', 'Scholars noted a striking opponent between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opportune', 'Suitable for some particular purpose', 'Scholars noted a striking opportune between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opposite', 'Located directly across from something else', 'Scholars noted a striking opposite between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opprobrium', 'The reproach incurred by conduct considered shameful', 'Her opprobrium became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opt', 'To choose, to select', 'Critics argued that the plan might opt the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Optic', 'Of, or relating to the eye or to vision', 'The author hoped the new policy would optic tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Optician', 'A person who makes or sells lenses, spectacles etc', 'Scholars noted a striking optician between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Optimism', 'A tendency to expect the best', 'Critics argued that the plan might optimism the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Option', 'Something that may be or is chosen, choice', 'The essay highlights the option of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Optometry', 'The art and science of vision and eye care', 'The essay highlights the optometry of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opulence', 'Wealth', 'The essay highlights the opulence of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opulent', 'Rich and luxurious', '“The palace was decorated in an opulent style.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Opus', 'A musical composition', 'The essay highlights the opus of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Oracular', 'Of or relating to an oracle', 'The author hoped the new policy would oracular tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Oral', 'Uttered by the mouth, spoken', 'Her oral became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Orate', 'To speak formally, to give a speech', 'Over time, the community learned to orate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Oration', 'A speech delivered in a formal or ceremonious manner', 'Scholars noted a striking oration between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Oratorio', 'A musical composition on a religious theme', 'The essay highlights the oratorio of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
